summary: All acceptance criteria verified. Stall detection code completely removed from daemon health tick (index.ts), feedback schema (feedback.ts), config (config.ts), and tests. No orphaned references. PromotedAutoDemoteEvent from main correctly preserved through conflict resolution. Types pass, lint passes, 1059/1059 tests pass.

criteria.criterion: Remove worker_stall notification from daemon health tick
criteria.evidence: grep -rn worker_stall returns no results. WorkerStallEvent interface, publishStallEvent function, workerMessageSnapshots Map, and stall detection block all removed from index.ts (-125 lines).

workerMessageSnapshots Map removed from index.ts. stallThresholdMs removed from DaemonConfig, DEFAULT_STALL_THRESHOLD_MINUTES, parseStallThresholdMsFromMinutes, config file parsing, env var parsing all removed from config.ts (-32 lines).
publishStallEvent function removed from index.ts. WorkerStallEventSchema removed from feedback.ts discriminated union (-12 lines).
Health tick loop still runs. PromotedAutoDemoteEvent from main correctly preserved. tsc passes. 1059/1059 tests pass.
Entire stall detection describe block (5 tests, 428 lines) removed from index.test.ts. Remaining 41 daemon index tests pass.
